name: Subtitle Assistant
description: Download YouTube subtitles and use AI to summarize, translate, or extract key points. No login required. Powered by evolink.ai
author: EvoLinkAI

dataTransmission.api.evolink.ai: AI commands (summarize, translate, keypoints) send downloaded subtitle text to api.evolink.ai for analysis by Claude. No data is stored after the response is returned. The download and languages commands only fetch subtitles from YouTube via yt-dlp and never transmit data to evolink.ai.
